entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench, the crop species being studied for grain mold resistance.

entities.name: GRAIN MOLD
entities.description: A disease complex that affects sorghum plants.

entities.name: GRAIN MOLD RESISTANCE
entities.description: The capacity of sorghum germ plasm accessions to resist the grain mold complex.

entities.name: FLAVAN-4-OLS
entities.description: Chemical compounds found in sorghum leaf tissues whose concentration correlates with grain mold resistance.

entities.name: METHANOL EXTRACTION
entities.description: The process of using methanol and acidified methanol to extract compounds from leaf tissues for analysis.

entities.name: DAYS AFTER EMERGENCE
entities.description: The measurement of time from plant emergence used to track leaf development and compound concentration.
